task: Same task applied to competitor: find ecommerce courses and enroll.

findings: Homepage content is partially readable — courses and categories visible
Title and some meta info extractable

test_b_comprehension.note: AI can identify courses including WooCommerce, understand pricing on /todos/ page (€737-1,837), and extract business identity. Significantly more readable than Ecommaster.

test_c_action.note: WooCommerce checkout functional. AI can add to cart and begin checkout process. Path requires navigation but is possible. Contact via WhatsApp available.

overall.comparison_headline: Ecommaster scores 0/10 (F) vs Escuela Emprende's 6.5/10 (C). Escuela Emprende is fully visible to AI agents while Ecommaster is completely invisible. A student asking AI 'where should I study ecommerce?' will NEVER be directed to Ecommaster.
